main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling first stage reduced biocide dosing frequency'.

key_signals.justification: Conecta cambio protocolo + ATP×4 + ΔP1 + CIP ácido alivio temporal.

recommended_action.justification: CIP alcalino SDS 0.1% + EDTA 0.2% + DBNPA 2 mg/L cada 3 días — completo, sin oxidante.

requested_data.justification: Pide ATP en superficie membrana — match exacto accepted.
